label_notes: Source: training knowledge (2026-03-20). WebFetch blocked due to network egress restrictions. Booking.com (owned by Booking Holdings) collects extensive payment and travel document data. GDPR compliance is important given European operations. Note that data sharing with accommodation partners is essential for booking functionality. VERIFY all claims against current live policy before publication.
